before.label: before
before.flairStyle: will-change: transform; transform: scale(0, 0); transform-origin: 0px 0px; translate: none; rotate: none; scale: none;

during.label: during
during.flairStyle: will-change: transform; transform: translate(49.4837%, 49.9023%) translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px) scale(0, 0); transform-origin: 0px 0px; translate: none; rotate: none; scale: none;

duringLate.label: duringLate
duringLate.flairStyle: will-change: transform; transform: translate(49.5805%, 50%) scale(0, 0); transform-origin: 0px 0px; translate: none; rotate: none; scale: none;

after.label: after
after.flairStyle: will-change: transform; transform: translate(49.5805%, 50%) scale(0, 0); transform-origin: 0px 0px; translate: none; rotate: none; scale: none;

top.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-black translate-y-0

at400.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-transparent translate-y-0

at900.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-transparent -translate-y-full lg:translate-y-0

at1600.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-transparent -translate-y-full lg:translate-y-0

scrollUpTo800.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-transparent translate-y-0

backTop.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-black translate-y-0

during.className: whitespace-nowrap font-medium text-lg transition-colors duration-300 text-white/90 hover:text-white

cursor.className: pointer-events-none fixed left-0 top-0 z-50 hidden -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 opacity-0 scale-0 lg:flex
cursor.style: transform: translate(-50%, -50%) translate(1504px, 55px) scale(0, 0); translate: none; rotate: none; scale: none; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden;

h1.className: sd-headline max-w-3xl text-3xl font-semibold leading-tight tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl lg:text-[60px] lg:leading-18

p.className: sd-description mt-5 max-w-200 text-base leading-4.5 text-gray-400 sm:mt-6 sm:text-[18px] sm:leading-5 lg:mt-8 lg:text-[20px] lg:leading-5.5

header.className: fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out bg-black translate-y-0
